headline: Is General Mills (GIS) Now Offering Opportunity After A 36% Share Price Slide?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether General Mills at around US$36.45 is starting to look like value, or if the market is instead pricing in deeper concerns about the business. The stock has had a rough patch, with a 2.4% decline over the last week, a 19.4% decline over the last month, and a 36.0% decline over the past year, which can change how investors think about both risk and long term potential. These moves are unfolding against a backdrop of ongoing attention on branded food companies,...
